system.description:
Slow and deliberate, but usually one ‘step' ahead. Sluglings are never in a hurry to be anywhere, but can be valuable allies on any journey – if you have the patience.

Snail's Pace

Your base Speed is 1 and you can walk on most surfaces. [A]

Your first Move Action each turn is free. [A]

Your level is always 1 higher than the rest of the party (up to 20). [A]

Vulnerable to salt. [A]

+3 Defense. [A]
